title: CXXRTL: Information loss when outputs are aliased

features.name: output_aliased_to_internal_wire
features.description: Code should include an output port assigned directly to an internal wire, creating an alias where the output signal shares the same storage as an internal wire that is not marked as an output

features.name: multi_level_wire_computation_chain
features.description: Code should include internal wires that are computed from other internal wires, creating a multi-level combinational logic chain where final outputs alias to intermediate computed wires

features.name: output_metadata_loss_after_optimization
features.description: Code should include output signals that get optimized by high-level synthesis optimization passes, causing debug metadata to lose the OUTPUT flag and incorrectly report the signal as an internal wire reference
